🗎 Export Schedule

📄 PDF Report

Generate a professional landscape PDF with selected sections — table, Gantt, EVM dashboard, S-curve, and DCMA. Opens in print preview where you can save as PDF.

🗎 Primavera P6 XER

Native P6 format. Import directly into Oracle Primavera P6 Professional.

📈 Microsoft Project

MSP 2016+ XML format. Open in Microsoft Project.

📊 CSV Spreadsheet

Full activity list with all fields. Opens in Excel / Google Sheets.

💾 JSON Backup

Complete schedule backup in JSON format for restore or analysis.

📋 WBS Template

Export the WBS structure as a reusable template for new projects.

© 2025 Project Assure Ltd. All Rights Reserved.

GenSched is a product of Project Assure Ltd. All schedule data is processed locally in your browser and is not transmitted to any external servers.

Exported files (XER, XML, CSV, JSON) are generated entirely client-side. Project Assure Ltd accepts no liability for decisions made based on schedules generated by this tool.

Users are responsible for verifying schedule outputs against contractual requirements, programme baselines, and applicable standards. This tool does not constitute professional project management advice.
